Malaysian Women's Tennis Players

Player profiles compiled from public sources. See also men's profiles.

SL Shihomi Leong WTA / ITF World Tennis Tour · NCAA (US college) Junior-title winner now playing US college tennis. WTA singles around No. 960 (June 2026) DH Daania Hazli ITF World Tennis Tour Juniors (Under-18) One of Malaysia’s leading junior girls. Active ITF junior — see ITF profile for the current figure EW Elsa Wan WTA / ITF Women’s World Tennis Tour Malaysia’s national women’s No. 1. Malaysia’s national women’s No. 1 (2026); WTA/ITF numeric ranking not confirmed in our sources
Profiles draw on public data from the ATP, WTA, ITF, Tennis Explorer and Malaysian media. Where a detail is not publicly available it is marked rather than guessed. Corrections welcome via our Contact page.

Last updated: 19 June 2026

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
